title: Mamdani-endorsed candidates win 3 House primaries as NYC mayor shows clout
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's endorsements secured victories for three progressive Democratic House primary candidates, defeating establishment-backed opponents and two incumbents. The article documents the political influence of NYC municipal leadership in federal electoral outcomes.

political_signal.description: NYC mayoral leadership actively campaigned for progressive Democratic candidates in federal primaries, signaling alignment with democratic socialist and progressive policy platforms. Demonstrates municipal-level political influence on federal candidate selection.

processing_notes: Article is primarily about federal/state politics rather than City of Syracuse governance or operations
No direct Syracuse impact identified; included for awareness of intergovernmental political dynamics and mayoral political posturing trends
Consider relevance only if tracking comparative municipal leadership models or political alignment strategies
